governance_requirements: Establishment of an AI Ethics Committee.
Mandatory documentation of model architecture and training data.

process_steps.description: Identify potential AI use cases and classify them based on risk levels defined by the EU AI Act.
success_criteria: Formal approval of risk classification by Chief Compliance Officer.
process_steps.step_name: Identify AI use cases and risk classification
governance_requirements: EU AI Act Risk Classification Guidelines
process_triggers: Initiation of a new AI project.
process_steps.purpose: To determine the regulatory requirements applicable to the AI system.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Differential privacy techniques and Carney access controls.

dependencies: Identify AI use cases and risk classification
process_end_conditions: DPIA is signed off by DPO.
process_steps.description: Conduct a Data Protection Impact Assessment to ensure compliance with GDPR and EU AI Act data privacy requirements.

process_steps.step_name: Implement NIST AI RMF - Govern and Map
process_steps.description: Implement the 'Govern' and 'Map' core functions of the NIST AI Risk Management Framework to establish governance structures and identify contextual risks.
success_criteria: Defined governance roles and complete risk map.
outputs: NIST AI RMF Govern & Map Report
deliverables: NIST AI RMF Govern & Map Report
process_end_conditions: Governance and risk mapping are established.
process_steps.purpose: To establish AI governance and map organizational risks.

process_end_conditions: Risk measurement and management protocols are active.
deliverables: NIST AI RMF Measure & Manage Report
inputs: NIST AI RMF Govern & Map Report
outputs: NIST AI RMF Measure & Manage Report
process_steps.scope: NIST AI RMF Measurement and Mitigation.
success_criteria: Successful quantification of risks and implementation of mitigation controls.
process_steps.description: Implement the 'Measure' and 'Manage' core functions of the NIST AI Risk Management Framework, utilizing automated tools where possible to quantify and mitigate risks.
process_steps.step_name: Implement NIST AI RMF - Measure and Manage
process_steps.purpose: To quantify and manage identified AI risks.
dependencies: Implement NIST AI RMF - Govern and Map
process_triggers: Completion of Govern and Map phase.

process_end_conditions: Model meets fairness and accuracy thresholds.
Bias testing results are within acceptable limits.
process_steps.description: Perform rigorous bias testing and model validation using automated bias testing tools and standardized validation suites to streamline technical accuracy checks.
success_criteria: Validation report confirms model meets all internal and regulatory benchmarks.
process_steps.step_name: Perform bias testing and model validation

step_risks_and_controls.control: Automated fairness audits and standardized validation suites.

process_steps.purpose: To minimize operational risk associated with AI bias via automated validation.
dependencies: Implement NIST AI RMF - Measure and Manage

process_steps.purpose: To ensure transparency and prepare for conformity assessment.
dependencies: Perform bias testing and model validation
inputs: NIST AI RMF Measure & Manage Report
process_steps.description: Compile all technical specifications and documentation required for EU AI Act compliance, initiating internal pre-assessment reviews to streamline the subsequent conformity phase.
success_criteria: Documentation package passes initial pre-assessment review.
process_steps.step_name: Document technical specifications for EU AI Act compliance

process_steps.purpose: To legally certify the AI system for the EU market.
dependencies: Document technical specifications for EU AI Act compliance
process_triggers: Completion of technical documentation and pre-assessment.
process_steps.scope: Regulatory compliance and market entry authorization.
process_steps.step_name: EU AI Act Conformity Assessment and Registration
process_steps.description: Conduct a conformity assessment (internal or via a notified body) for high-risk AI systems to ensure compliance with the EU AI Act and register the system in the EU database as per Article 51. Utilize parallel pre-assessment data to expedite.
success_criteria: Successful entry in the EU public database.

process_steps.purpose: To maintain operational integrity and compliance in production.

step_risks_and_controls.control: Real-time drift detection and human intervention triggers.

dependencies: EU AI Act Conformity Assessment and Registration
process_steps.step_name: Deploy and monitor with human oversight
process_steps.description: Deploy the AI system with continuous monitoring and established human-in-the-loop oversight protocols.
success_criteria: Continuous operation within defined performance and compliance parameters.

critical_failure_factors.description: Lack of data transparency and failure to update models according to changing regulations.
critical_failure_factors.name: Regulatory Non-Compliance

critical_failure_factors.description: Insufficient human-in-the-loop oversight leading to unmanaged AI errors.
critical_failure_factors.name: Operational Oversight Failure

process_triggers: Initiation of a new AI project.
Updates to NIST or EU AI Act regulations.
Significant changes to an existing AI model.
assumptions: The regulatory requirements for high-risk AI systems in finance will remain stable for the next 12 months.
Internal data sources are sufficient and cleaned for bias mitigation.
The organization possesses the necessary budget for external legal and technical audits.
introduction: This framework establishes a comprehensive approach for AI governance in the financial sector, ensuring compliance with the EU AI Act and NIST AI Risk Management Framework.

risks_and_controls.control: Regular fairness audits and diverse training datasets.
Differential privacy techniques and strict access controls.

constraints: Must meet the strict implementation deadlines set by the EU AI Act.
Limited availability of subject matter experts in both AI and financial regulation.
Hardware limitations for performing extensive stress testing on complex models.

critical_success_factors.description: Alignment with EU AI Act high-risk AI requirements and integration with NIST AI RMF.
critical_success_factors.name: Regulatory Alignment

continuous_improvement.review_frequency: Bi-annual review of the framework effectiveness.
improvement_inputs: Feedback loops from production monitoring into the development stage.
Adoption of emerging best practices in AI safety.

process_name: AI Regulatory Compliance Framework (NIST & EU AI Act)
purpose: To provide a structured and compliant framework for developing, deploying, and managing AI systems within the financial sector.

system_requirements.name: Model inventory management system
system_requirements.details: Centralized repository for all AI models and their metadata.

system_requirements.name: Automated monitoring and alerting tools
system_requirements.details: Tools for real-time performance tracking and alerting.
Encrypted storage for sensitive training and operational data.
system_requirements.name: Secure data storage with encryption
Audit trail logging
system_requirements.details: Comprehensive logging of all system and user actions for audit purposes.

responsibilities: Designing the framework according to technical standards.
Ensuring GDPR and EU AI Act data privacy compliance.

reporting_and_analytics.description: Real-time monitoring of model performance and drift.
Reports provided to stakeholders regarding AI system transparency.

change_management.change_request_process: Formal review process for any logic or data changes.
change_management.versioning_rules: Version control for all model iterations and training sessions for staff on framework updates.

metrics.description: Quantitative measure of model transparency and interpretability.
metrics.name: Model explainability score
Time-to-market for AI solutions
metrics.description: Average time taken to bring AI solutions to market.

metrics.name: Incident response time for AI failures
metrics.description: Time taken to respond to and resolve AI failures.

process_end_conditions: AI system passes final certification and is in production with continuous monitoring.
scope: All AI-driven models and processes within the financial institution, specifically targeting those categorized as high-risk under EU law.
